SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select 
 sha2(concat(practiceCode,'|',practiceName),256) as practiceUnitKey
,practiceCode as practiceUnitID
,practiceName as practiceUnitName
from 
(
 select distinct practiceCode, practiceName 
 from  MAMembershipStars
 where practiceCode is not null
)
union all
select
 '-1' as practiceUnitKey
,'unknown' as practiceUnitID
,'unknown' as practiceUnitName
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s
ON s.practiceUnitID=t.practiceUnitID AND s.practiceUnitName=t.practiceUnitName
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
(
 practiceUnitKey
,practiceUnitID
,practiceUnitName
)
VALUES
(
 s.practiceUnitKey
,s.practiceUnitID
,s.practiceUnitName
)
